info.description: Global config editable from admin. Twilio, OpenAI, and demo flags. Env vars are used as fallback if empty.

twilioSid.description: Twilio Account SID. Fallback: TWILIO_SID in .env

twilioToken.description: Twilio Auth Token. Fallback: TWILIO_TOKEN in .env

twilioPhone.description: Twilio sender number (e.g. +17404956845). Fallback: TWILIO_PHONE in .env

twilioTestTo.description: Destination for test SMS (e.g. +525554008788). Fallback: TWILIO_TEST_TO in .env

openaiApiKey.description: OpenAI API key for chatbot. Fallback: OPENAI_API_KEY in .env

openaiModel.description: OpenAI chat model. Fallback: OPENAI_MODEL or gpt-4o-mini

emergencyDemoSimulateDelivery.description: If true, SMS/email are only logged, not sent (demo mode)

emergencyDemoNotifyAllContacts.description: If true, emergency notifies all contacts regardless of canReceiveEmergencyAlert
